category_sources: source_facts.description says BlazeMeter Taurus; official site describes Taurus as an automation-friendly framework for continuous testing.
display_name_sources: Official site and GitHub README use Taurus as the project name; source_facts.name provides the executable/package name bzt.
docs_sources: Official gettaurus.org User Manual is the dedicated documentation path.
repo_sources: Official gettaurus.org homepage has a GitHub link to Blazemeter/taurus; GitHub repository README identifies Taurus.
tags_sources: Official site and README describe continuous testing and reliance on JMeter, Selenium, Gatling, and related tools.
